calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Michael Lieberman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Yukito Ito, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: James A. Jefferson and Roscoe Hankins III as follows:
Damages $400,000.00
Punitive Damages $400,000.00, for a total of $800,000.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2005 Continued To Aug-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2005 Continued To Jun-03-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
